summary: ATR-Adaptive Buffers for Delta Zonal Ancorado - All 16 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend tests passed. N2 uses ATR(M5) with fractions VWAP/POC=1.0x, VAH/VAL=0.75x. N3 uses ATR(M1) with fractions call/put_wall=0.25x, zgl=0.50x, vwap±3σ=0.50x. Both /api/v3/signal/{symbol} and /api/v3/delta-zonal/{symbol} endpoints return correct ATR info. Frontend renders Delta Zonal cards with buffer info, ATR fraction labels, and position indicators.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ returns N2 delta_zonal with mode=N2_STRUCTURE and atr_m5
✅ N2 levels include: buffer, buffer_range, atr_fraction, volume_in_buffer, position
✅ N2 ATR fractions correct: VWAP=1.0, POC=1.0, VAH=0.75, VAL=0.75
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ returns N3 delta_zonal with mode=N3_EXTREME and atr_m1
✅ N3 levels include: buffer, atr_fraction, zone_range
✅ N3 ATR fractions correct: call_wall=0.25, put_wall=0.25, zgl=0.50, vwap_pos3s=0.50, vwap_neg3s=0.50
✅ GET /api/v3/delta-zonal/MNQ returns 200 with n2_structure and n3_extreme
✅ delta-zonal endpoint N2 has atr_m5
✅ delta-zonal endpoint N3 has atr_m1
✅ MES signal endpoint returns 200
✅ MES delta-zonal endpoint returns 200
✅ MES N2 levels have correct ATR fractions
✅ ATR_M1 < ATR_M5 (correct scaling)
✅ N2 buffer = atr_m5 * atr_fraction (verified)
✅ N3 buffer = atr_m1 * atr_fraction (verified)
✅ Frontend N2 panel renders Delta Zonal cards with buffer info
✅ Frontend N2 shows ATR(M5) label
✅ Frontend N2 shows ATR fraction labels (1.0x ATR, 0.75x ATR)
✅ Frontend N2 shows position indicators (ABOVE/BELOW/BUFFER)
✅ Frontend N3 panel renders Delta Zonal Extremo cards with buffer info
✅ Frontend N3 shows ATR(M1) label
✅ Frontend N3 shows ATR fraction labels (0.25x ATR, 0.5x ATR)
✅ Frontend N3 shows zone_range for each level
✅ Dashboard loads without errors
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: ATR-adaptive buffers for Delta Zonal Ancorado fully implemented and tested. Key implementation details: 1) N2 uses ATR(M5) computed from 5-minute candles with fractions: VWAP/POC=1.00x, VAH/VAL=0.75x. 2) N3 uses ATR(M1) computed from 1-minute candles with fractions: call_wall/put_wall=0.25x, zgl=0.50x, vwap±3σ=0.50x. 3) ATR fallback from 1H: M5=ATR_1H/sqrt(12), M1=ATR_1H/sqrt(60). 4) Backend services: DeltaZonalService in /app/backend/services/delta_zonal_service.py. 5) Endpoints: /api/v3/signal/{symbol} (includes delta_zonal in nivel_2 and nivel_3), /api/v3/delta-zonal/{symbol} (dedicated endpoint). 6) Frontend components: N2Confirmatory.jsx (DeltaZonalLevelCard), N3Execution.jsx (DeltaZonalExtremeCard). 7) Market is closed (weekend) so data is SIMULATED - indicated by 'source: simulated' in API response and 'Mercado fechado - dados simulados' in UI.

feature_verification.frontend_n2_panel: Working - Delta Zonal cards with buffer info
feature_verification.frontend_n3_panel: Working - Delta Zonal Extremo cards with buffer info

mocked_api_note: LiveDataService disabled (ENABLE_LIVE_DATA=false). Delta Zonal uses simulate_n2/simulate_n3 when market is closed (weekend). ATR values are scaled from 1H ATR using sqrt() when no trades available.
